title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Kinemon, Nami, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as the Straw Hats and Law reach Dressrosa, split into teams, and step into Doflamingo’s territory while the Mera Mera no Mi appears as bait.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: As a Samural child of Wanokuni, he is regret- tably haughty ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But for you to oppose so earnestly an opponent of a mere eight years of age...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I HATE COWARDS!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...!!! Curses! Nami-San, that nasty brute...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Come here, now

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Get away from her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Like Father Like Son!! You call yourself a Samuel, but now we see your true colors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm not to blame, that I'm not!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Let's hurry up and head for the city. Kinemon, have you got our disgustes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Indeed, that I do. Everyone in Dressrosa is garbed as such, that they are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So that you may blend in while in the city, allow me to perform the transformation!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For men, collared shirts

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa is the best !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: For women, nothing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You've got to be kidding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: HEY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I want you to take this

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A VIVRECARD ...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It leads to "Zou," which I mentioned earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If something should happen to us, head there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey!! Nothing's gonna happen to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We'll see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is a map from my crew

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's very poorly drawn!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right now... we're around here....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The group delivering Caesar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: DressrossA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Current location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: will pass through Dressrosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: and cross this long bridge that stretches to the north, over to green bit

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Why not just take everyone and go by ship !?!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've heard that going by water isn't possible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sounds fun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PL.... PLEASE KEEP ME SAFE! YOU HEAR ME!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kanjuro....!! I pray for his safety, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey!! What do you mean, *If the enemy comes ..."!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Eh!? Will we really be safe, watching over the ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, this is enemy headquarters, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But as long as Sanji's also here, guarding along with us

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ehh!!? Sanj!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Where'd strawhat-ya and the others go!!? They're essential to the plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey!! Who's gonna protect us!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Those who visit this country ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: are captivated by a number of things

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: First- the sweet- smelling fields of lowers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The aromas of the cuisine that the country prides itself on

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Also...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The tire- less and never- ceasing ...

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
